temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A blurry, close-up shot focuses on the side of a dark-colored car. The camera slowly pushes in, revealing the texture of the car's paint and a small puddle of water on the roof rack. The scene is dimly lit, creating a moody and mysterious atmosphere. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and somber tone for the video, focusing on a key object, the car.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ambient, and slightly ominous electronic hum.)
(00:03-00:07) The scene cuts to a low-angle, wide shot of a modern, multi-story building at dusk. The sky is a deep, dark blue, and a single streetlight illuminates the area. The building's windows are dark, and a construction crane is visible on an adjacent structure. The Chinese characters '风行网' (Fengxing.com) are superimposed in the top-left corner. (Storyline: This shot establishes the urban setting of the story, contrasting the modern architecture with the dim, blue-toned lighting.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ambient electronic hum continues, now layered with the faint sound of rain.)
